query:
SELECT s.id, s.jobId, s.sceneIndex, s.status, s.videoUrl, s.updatedAt,
       j.status as jobStatus, j.scenesTotal, j.scenesCompleted
FROM musicVideoScenes s
JOIN musicVideoJobs j ON s.jobId = j.id
WHERE j.createdAt > (NOW() - INTERVAL 3 HOUR)
ORDER BY j.createdAt DESC, s.sceneIndex ASC
LIMIT 20;
